inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of one technician per hour including wages and benefits.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa horaria de mano de obra

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of one technician per hour including wages and benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir teknisyenin maaş ve yan haklar dahil saatlik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Techniker pro Stunde inklusive Lohn und Nebenkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'un technicien par heure, salaires et avantages compris.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de un técnico por hora, incluyendo salarios y beneficios.

inputs.label: Number of Technicians
inputs.businessContext: Number of maintenance personnel assigned per task.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of maintenance personnel assigned per task.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her görev için atanan bakım personeli sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der pro Aufgabe eingesetzten Wartungskräfte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'agents de maintenance assignés par tâche.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de personal de mantenimiento asignado por tarea.

inputs.label: Hours per Maintenance
inputs.businessContext: Average time to complete one maintenance task.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to complete one maintenance task.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir bakım görevini tamamlamak için ortalama süre.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen pour réaliser une tâche de maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo promedio para completar una tarea de mantenimiento.

inputs.label: Maintenance Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of maintenance tasks per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of maintenance tasks per year.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de tâches de maintenance par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de tareas de mantenimiento por año.

inputs.label: Parts Cost per Maintenance
inputs.businessContext: Cost of spare parts and consumables per maintenance event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of spare parts and consumables per maintenance event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bakım olayı için yedek parça ve sarf malzemesi maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Ersatzteile und Verbrauchsmaterial pro Wartungsereignis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des pièces de rechange et consommables par événement de maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de piezas de repuesto y consumibles por evento de mantenimiento.

inputs.label: Overhead Cost per Maintenance
inputs.businessContext: Additional costs such as tools, facilities, and indirect expenses per event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional costs such as tools, facilities, and indirect expenses per event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her olay için alet, tesis ve dolaylı giderler gibi ek maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten wie Werkzeuge, Einrichtungen und indirekte Ausgaben pro Ereignis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts supplémentaires tels que outils, installations et dépenses indirectes par événement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes adicionales como herramientas, instalaciones y gastos indirectos por evento.
